choir.def: 合唱團、(教堂)唱詩班、唱詩席的人物 (單數)
choir.ex: She has been a member of the local church choir for years.

choirboy.ex: A solo choirboy sang a beautiful melody at the wedding today.

choirmaster.ex: The strict choirmaster demanded absolute perfection from singers.

choke.def: 窒息、噎住、阻塞、使熄火、噎住的人的人物、阻塞地 (塞)
choke.col: choke on, choke back (抑制), choke off (阻止)
choke.ex: She began to choke on a piece of hard candy at the party.

choker.def: 貼頸項鍊、勒死者的人物 (單數)
choker.ex: The actress wore a stunning velvet necklace around her neck.

choking.def: 令人窒息的、噎住的人 (或物) (塞)
choking.ex: The room was filled with thick and truly choking black smoke.

choler.def: 膽汁、憤怒的人的人物 (單數)
choler.ex: His rude remarks moved the old man to sudden and deep choler.

cholera.ex: The sudden outbreak of cholera was caused by dirty water.

choleric.def: 易怒的、暴躁的人的人物
choleric.ex: He has a very choleric disposition and gets angry easily.

cholesterol.ex: You need to lower your high cholesterol levels by exercising.

chomp.def: 大聲咀嚼、咬響牙齒、吃的人的人物、大聲地 (嚼)
chomp.ex: The horse began to chomp loudly on a large and juicy apple.

choose.def: 選擇、挑選、願意的人物 (選)
choose.col: choose from, nothing to choose between (不分上下)
choose.ex: Please choose two items from the menu for your breakfast.

choosiness.def: 挑剔、愛挑選的人物 (單數)
choosiness.ex: His extreme choosiness made it hard to find a suit today.

choosy.def: 愛挑選的、挑剔的人人物 (挑)
choosy.ex: My younger brother is a very choosy eater and hates greens.

chop.def: (用斧)砍、劈、剁碎、排骨、切的人的人物、砍劈地 (砍)
chop.col: chop down, pork chop, chop and change (反覆無常)
chop.ex: He used a sharp axe to chop some wood for the winter fire.

chopped.def: 切碎了的的人的人 (或物) (碎)
chopped.ex: The recipe calls for three large finely chopped onions today.

chopper.def: 斧頭、切割者、(口)直升機的人物 (單數)
chopper.ex: The police chopper was circling over the city all night.

chopping.def: 砍、劈、正在剁碎的人 (或物) (砍)
chopping.ex: Always wash the wooden chopping board after cutting raw meat.

choppy.def: (水)波浪起伏的、(動作)不連貫的人人物 (起伏)
choppy.ex: The small boat struggled across the very cold and choppy sea.

chopstick.ex: Can you show me how to use a pair of chopsticks correctly?
